title: EnderPearlBouncer
description: this plugin adds a option to cancel/bounce back ender pearls when they hit barriers usefull to protect areas world borders and arenas
body:
# EnderPearlBouncer - Minecraft Plugin

EnderPearlBouncer is a lightweight Bukkit/Spigot plugin that gives server administrators complete control over ender pearl behavior when interacting with barrier blocks. Perfect for parkour maps, PvP arenas, and custom game modes where you need to restrict player movement through barriers.
Key Features

The plugin offers two distinct modes that can be switched on-the-fly:
# Cancel Mode

When ender pearls hit barrier blocks, they simply disappear with no teleportation. Players receive a clear message and audio feedback that their pearl was cancelled. This is ideal for hard boundaries where you want to completely prevent access.
# Bounce Mode

Pearls realistically bounce back from barrier walls based on the surface they hit. The physics system calculates the proper reflection angle and reduces velocity to 80% for authentic bounce mechanics. Great for creating skill-based parkour challenges where players must carefully aim their throws. 
# Administration

Administrators can toggle between modes using simple commands (/pearlmode cancel or /pearlmode bounce), and the selected mode persists across server restarts through automatic config saving.

The plugin includes full permission support, informative player messages, immersive sound effects, and handles all edge cases to ensure stable performance. Whether you're building a competitive arena or an adventure map, EnderPearlBouncer gives you the tools to precisely control ender pearl mechanics.
